001package applicationMain;
002
003import java.util.ArrayList;
004import java.util.List;
005
006import entityClasses.Post;
007import entityClasses.PostList;
008import entityClasses.Reply;
009import entityClasses.ReplyList;
010
011/**
012 * Prototype archive for grader/teacher workflows.
013 *
014 * <p>This class provides filtered views over discussion data so graders can quickly inspect
015 * student activity without scanning the full board.
016 */
017public class DiscussionArchive {
018
019        private final PostList postList;
020        private final ReplyList replyList;
021
022        /**
023         * Builds an archive view using the shared discussion repository.
024         */
025        public DiscussionArchive() {
026                DiscussionService service = DiscussionService.getInstance();
027                this.postList = service.getPostList();
028                this.replyList = service.getReplyList();
029        }
030
031        /**
032         * Returns all posts authored by one student.
033         *
034         * @param studentId student id used for filtering
035         * @return posts created by that student
036         */
037        public List<Post> getPostsByStudentId(String studentId) {
038                List<Post> matched = new ArrayList<Post>();
039                if (studentId == null || studentId.trim().isEmpty()) {
040                        return matched;
041                }
042
043                String cleanStudentId = studentId.trim();
044                for (Post post : postList.readAllPosts()) {
045                        String authorId = post.getAuthorAsuUserId();
046                        if (authorId != null && cleanStudentId.equals(authorId.trim())) {
047                                matched.add(post);
048                        }
049                }
050                return matched;
051        }
052
053        /**
054         * Returns all replies authored by one student.
055         *
056         * @param studentId student id used for filtering
057         * @return replies created by that student
058         */
059        public List<Reply> getRepliesByStudentId(String studentId) {
060                List<Reply> matched = new ArrayList<Reply>();
061                if (studentId == null || studentId.trim().isEmpty()) {
062                        return matched;
063                }
064
065                String cleanStudentId = studentId.trim();
066                for (Reply reply : replyList.readAllReplies()) {
067                        String authorId = reply.getAuthorAsuUserId();
068                        if (authorId != null && cleanStudentId.equals(authorId.trim())) {
069                                matched.add(reply);
070                        }
071                }
072                return matched;
073        }
074}
